mapper.select: SELECT M.MENU_CODE, D.CODE_NM AS MENU_NM, D.CODE_DC AS MENU_NM_EN, M.MENU_URL FROM COMTNMENUINFO M INNER JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE AND D.CODE_ID = #{codeId} WHERE LENGTH(M.MENU_CODE) = 8 AND COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY D.CODE

SELECT M.MENU_CODE, D.CODE_NM AS MENU_NM, D.CODE_DC AS MENU_NM_EN, M.MENU_URL, F.FEATURE_CODE, F.FEATURE_NM, F.FEATURE_NM_EN, F.FEATURE_DC, F.USE_AT FROM COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F INNER JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON M.MENU_CODE = F.MENU_CODE INNER JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE AND D.CODE_ID = #{codeId} WHERE 1 = 1
AND F.MENU_CODE = #{menuCode}
AND ( LOWER(F.FEATURE_CODE) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(F.FEATURE_NM) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(F.FEATURE_NM_EN) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(F.FEATURE_DC) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY F.MENU_CODE, F.FEATURE_CODE

SELECT M.MENU_CODE, D.CODE_NM AS MENU_NM, D.CODE_DC AS MENU_NM_EN, M.MENU_URL, F.FEATURE_CODE, F.FEATURE_NM, F.FEATURE_NM_EN, F.FEATURE_DC, F.USE_AT FROM COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO F INNER JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON M.MENU_CODE = F.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE WHERE F.FEATURE_CODE = #{featureCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO ( MENU_CODE, FEATURE_CODE, FEATURE_NM, FEATURE_NM_EN, FEATURE_DC, USE_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{menuCode}, #{featureCode}, #{featureNm}, #{featureNmEn}, #{featureDc}, #{useAt}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNMENUFUNCTIONINFO SET FEATURE_NM = #{featureNm}, FEATURE_NM_EN = #{featureNmEn}, FEATURE_DC = #{featureDc}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE FEATURE_CODE = #{featureCode}
